title: cyanus adscendens
intro: Cyanus adscendens, also known as cornflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate urinary tract issues. The health benefits of cornflower include reducing eye inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, cornflower is often combined with other herbs in teas, infusions, and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties, such as calming effects and wound healing.
